name: get_monthly_nilm_consumption_breakdown
description: Retrieve monthly electricity consumption breakdown by appliance or usage category for a home using Non-Intrusive Load Monitoring (NILM) analysis to identify individual appliance or device-level consumption patterns

home_id.description: The unique identifier of the home for which to retrieve NILM consumption breakdown

month.description: The month for which to retrieve consumption data (1-12)

year.description: The year for which to retrieve consumption data (e.g., 2026)
